OCT 202601

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Thursday

MONTH BEGINS
HOLY FIRE
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“The fire shall ever be burning upon the altar; it shall never go out.”Leviticus 6:13 (KJV)

REFLECTION

The fire of God is not meant to flare once and fade but to burn continually on the altar of your heart. It is the passion, the presence, and the purity that keep your devotion alive. Fire requires tending; what you feed grows, and what you neglect grows cold. Guard the flame today, adding the fuel of prayer and the Word, so the holy fire never dies down within you.

I DECREE

1

The fire of God burns on the altar of my heart, and it shall never go out.

Leviticus 6:13
2

I am baptized with the Holy Ghost and with fire, and that fire consumes every impurity.

Matthew 3:11
3

My God is a consuming fire, and His flame in me devours every cold and careless thing.

Hebrews 12:29
4

I am a minister made a flame of fire, ablaze with passion that draws the searching.

Hebrews 1:7
5

The zeal of the Lord's house consumes me, and I burn bright for God before my generation. Glory!

Psalm 69:9

PROPHECY

The fire is being rekindled in you! What grew cold is catching flame again this season!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for the fire that burns in me. (Lev 6:13)

Baptize me afresh with Your fire. (Matt 3:11)

Let Your flame never go out in me in Jesus' name. (Heb 1:7)

A WORD IN VERSE

Keep burning, holy fire, upon my heart,And never let the sacred flame grow dim;Consume in me each cold and careless part,Till all I am burns bright and pure for Him.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents01 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202602

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Friday

WEEK 1
REVIVAL
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“Wilt thou not revive us again: that thy people may rejoice in thee?”Psalm 85:6 (KJV)

REFLECTION

Revival is God breathing fresh life into what has grown weary or dry. It is not a meeting on a calendar but a renewal in the heart, a returning of joy and first love. Where there has been slumber, revival awakens; where there has been dryness, it brings rain. Ask God to revive you again, for the same God who first stirred your soul delights to stir it afresh.

I DECREE

1

God revives me again, and I rejoice in Him with a joy that will not be quenched.

Psalm 85:6
2

What grew dry and weary in me comes back to life by the breath of the Spirit.

Ezekiel 37:9
3

Times of refreshing come from the presence of the Lord and wash over my life.

Acts 3:19
4

The Lord revives His work in the midst of my years, and my first love burns again.

Habakkuk 3:2
5

Rivers spring up in my wilderness, and dead places in me are stirred back to life.

Isaiah 43:19

PROPHECY

Revive again! What grew dry and weary in you is coming back to life this season!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for reviving me. (Ps 85:6)

Breathe Your life into every dry area. (Ezek 37:9)

Send times of refreshing to me in Jesus' name. (Acts 3:19)

A WORD IN VERSE

Revive me, Lord, and stir my sleeping soul,Breathe fresh upon the embers nearly gone;Restore the joy that once had made me whole,And wake in me the fire of every dawn.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents02 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202603

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Saturday

WEEK 1
THE BURNING HEART
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“And they said one to another, Did not our heart burn within us, while he talked with us by the way, and while he opened to us the scriptures?”Luke 24:32 (KJV)

REFLECTION

There is a burning that comes when Christ Himself draws near and opens the Word. The disciples on the Emmaus road felt their hearts burn before they knew who walked beside them. This holy fire in the bones is what turns duty into desire and reading into encounter. Let your heart burn today, for the Word is not merely to be studied but to be set aflame.

I DECREE

1

My heart burns within me as He opens the Scriptures and makes His Word alive.

Luke 24:32
2

His Word is in my heart as a fire shut up in my bones that I cannot hold back.

Jeremiah 20:9
3

I am fervent in spirit, serving the Lord with a heat that never cools to routine.

Romans 12:11
4

My heart was hot within me, and while I mused the holy fire burned all the brighter.

Psalm 39:3
5

No cold reading now, but living encounter, for Christ Himself sets my heart aflame.

Acts 2:3

PROPHECY

Your heart is beginning to burn again! The Word is becoming fire shut up in your bones!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for setting my heart on fire. (Luke 24:32)

Keep me fervent in spirit. (Rom 12:11)

Let holy zeal consume me in Jesus' name. (John 2:17)

A WORD IN VERSE

My heart burns bright as He unfolds the Word,And every line becomes a living flame;No colder reading now, but fire stirredWithin my bones at mention of His name.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents03 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202604

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Sunday

WEEK 1
THE POWER OF PRAYER
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“Confess your faults one to another, and pray one for another, that ye may be healed. The effectual fervent prayer of a righteous man availeth much.”James 5:16 (KJV)

REFLECTION

Prayer is not a last resort but the first weapon, the place where heaven and earth meet. The fervent prayer of a righteous heart accomplishes far more than the strongest human effort. It is not eloquence that moves God but faith and persistence that will not let go. Give yourself to prayer today, for what you cannot change by striving you can shift on your knees.

I DECREE

1

The fervent prayer of the righteous avails much, and my prayers move the hand of God.

James 5:16
2

Whatever I ask in prayer, believing, I receive, for my Father hears me always.

Mark 11:24
3

I pray without ceasing, and what I cannot change by striving I shift on my knees.

1 Thessalonians 5:17
4

I ought always to pray and not to faint, and my persistence unlocks heaven's answers.

Luke 18:1
5

I ask and it is given, I seek and I find, I knock and every door is opened to me.

Matthew 7:7

PROPHECY

Your prayers are availing much! What you could not move by effort is shifting as you pray!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for hearing my prayers. (1 John 5:14)

Teach me to pray without ceasing. (1 Thess 5:17)

Let my prayers avail much in Jesus' name. (James 5:16)

A WORD IN VERSE

The fervent prayer that rises from my heartAvails far more than all my striving hands;On bended knee I do the greater part,And move by faith what earthly force withstands.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents04 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202605

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Monday

WEEK 1
CONSUMING PASSION
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“And thou shalt love the Lord thy God with all thy heart, and with all thy soul, and with all thy mind, and with all thy strength: this is the first commandment.”Mark 12:30 (KJV)

REFLECTION

God is not after a portion of your heart but the whole of it. A consuming passion for Him is not fanaticism but the only fitting response to a love that gave everything. When He becomes your supreme desire, everything else falls into its proper place. Let your love for Him be wholehearted today, for a divided heart never knows the fullness of His presence.

I DECREE

1

With all my heart, soul, mind, and strength I love the Lord who first loved me.

Mark 12:30
2

One thing I desire and seek: to dwell in the house of the Lord all my days.

Psalm 27:4
3

Early will I seek Him, for my soul thirsts and my flesh longs after the living God.

Psalm 63:1
4

Whom have I in heaven but Him, and there is none on earth I desire beside Him.

Psalm 73:25
5

As the deer pants for water, so my soul pants after God with undivided passion.

Psalm 42:1

PROPHECY

A consuming passion is rising in you! Your love for Him is about to burn wholehearted again!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for the passion You stir in me. (Ps 63:1)

Help me love You with all I am. (Mark 12:30)

Let my one desire be You in Jesus' name. (Ps 27:4)

A WORD IN VERSE

With all my heart and soul and mind and mightI love the One who first so loved me whole;No divided flame, no half given light,But all consumed, my undivided soul.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents05 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202606

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Tuesday

WEEK 1
BOLDNESS IN WITNESS
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“And when they had prayed, the place was shaken where they were assembled together; and they were all filled with the Holy Ghost, and they spake the word of God with boldness.”Acts 4:31 (KJV)

REFLECTION

Boldness in witness is not natural confidence but a fruit of being filled with the Spirit. The same disciples who hid in fear were transformed into fearless witnesses when the fire fell. You do not manufacture this courage; you receive it as you are filled afresh. Speak of Him today without shrinking back, for the Spirit who filled the early church still emboldens the willing heart.

I DECREE

1

I am filled with the Holy Ghost, and I speak the word of God with holy boldness.

Acts 4:31
2

I am not ashamed of the gospel, for it is the power of God unto salvation.

Romans 1:16
3

Grant unto me boldness, and I declare Christ where fear once held my tongue.

Acts 4:29
4

The righteous are bold as a lion, and I witness without shrinking before any crowd.

Proverbs 28:1
5

God gave me a spirit of power and not of fear, and I testify with signs following. Glory!

2 Timothy 1:7

PROPHECY

A holy boldness is filling you! You will speak of Him where fear once held your tongue!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for boldness to witness. (Acts 4:31)

Take away every fear and shame. (Rom 1:16)

Let me speak Your word boldly in Jesus' name. (Acts 4:29)

A WORD IN VERSE

No longer silent, gripped by dread and shame,But filled with fire, I speak His word aloud;The Spirit emboldens me to bear His nameBefore the watching world and every crowd.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents06 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202607

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Wednesday

WEEK 1
THE GLORY REALM
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“But we all, with open face beholding as in a glass the glory of the Lord, are changed into the same image from glory to glory, even as by the Spirit of the LORD.”2 Corinthians 3:18 (KJV)

REFLECTION

The glory realm is the manifest presence of God, where heaven touches earth and lives are transformed. As you behold Him with an open face, you are changed into His image from glory to glory. This is not achieved by striving but by beholding, by lingering in His presence until it marks you. Seek His face today, for those who behold His glory cannot stay the same.

I DECREE

1

I am changed from glory to glory by the Spirit as I behold the face of the Lord.

2 Corinthians 3:18
2

Show me Your glory, Lord, and let Your goodness pass before me as I seek Your face.

Exodus 33:18
3

The whole earth is filled with His glory, and I live and move in His manifest presence.

Numbers 14:21
4

The glory of the latter is greater than the former, and my best days are ahead.

Haggai 2:9
5

Those who behold His glory cannot stay the same, and His presence marks me forever.

Isaiah 60:1

PROPHECY

You are moving from glory to glory! His presence is marking you as you behold Him!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for inviting me into Your glory. (2 Cor 3:18)

Let Your glory rest upon my life. (Isa 60:1)

Cover me with Your presence in Jesus' name. (Isa 58:8)

A WORD IN VERSE

From glory unto glory I am changed,Beholding Him with open, seeking face;My very likeness by His light rearranged,Transformed within the glory of His grace.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents07 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202608

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Thursday

WEEK 2
THE FEAR OF GOD
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“The fear of the LORD is clean, enduring for ever: the judgments of the LORD are true and righteous altogether.”Psalm 19:9 (KJV)

REFLECTION

The fear of God is not dread but a reverent awe that honours Him above all else. It is clean, life-giving, and the beginning of true wisdom. When you rightly revere God, every lesser fear must bow, for the one who fears Him need fear nothing else. Cultivate this holy reverence today, for it is the foundation on which a wise and stable life is built.

I DECREE

1

The fear of the Lord is clean, enduring forever, and it is the beginning of my wisdom.

Psalm 19:9
2

The secret of the Lord is with them that fear Him, and He shows me His covenant.

Psalm 25:14
3

Every lesser fear bows, for the one who fears God need fear nothing else at all.

Proverbs 14:27
4

By mercy and the fear of the Lord I depart from evil and walk in His protection.

Proverbs 16:6
5

The fear of the Lord is my treasure, the foundation of a wise and stable life.

Proverbs 9:10

PROPHECY

A holy reverence is deepening in you! The fear of the Lord will make you wise and unshakable!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for the gift of holy reverence. (Ps 19:9)

Teach me to fear You rightly. (Ps 25:14)

Let Your fear keep me from evil in Jesus' name. (Prov 16:6)

A WORD IN VERSE

The fear of God is clean and pure and bright,The dawn of wisdom in the humble soul;Before His majesty all fears take flight,And reverence makes the trembling spirit whole.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents08 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202609

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Friday

WEEK 2
SANCTIFICATION
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“And the very God of peace sanctify you wholly; and I pray God your whole spirit and soul and body be preserved blameless unto the coming of our Lord Jesus Christ.”1 Thessalonians 5:23 (KJV)

REFLECTION

Sanctification is the ongoing work of being set apart and made holy, spirit, soul, and body. It is not a single moment but a lifelong yielding to the God who is making you like Himself. He does not merely forgive you; He transforms you, purifying what He has claimed. Yield to that work today, for the God who began your sanctification is faithful to complete it.

I DECREE

1

The God of peace sanctifies me wholly, spirit, soul, and body, blameless in Christ.

1 Thessalonians 5:23
2

I yield my members as instruments of righteousness, set apart for God's use.

Romans 6:13
3

I follow holiness, without which no man shall see the Lord, and I am being made like Him.

Hebrews 12:14
4

I purge myself to be a vessel of honour, sanctified and fit for the Master's use.

2 Timothy 2:21
5

I am washed, sanctified, and justified in the name of the Lord Jesus and the Spirit.

1 Corinthians 6:11

PROPHECY

A setting apart is happening in you! God is sanctifying you wholly for His purposes!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for sanctifying me. (1 Thess 5:23)

Purify my heart and hands. (1 Cor 6:11)

Make me an instrument of righteousness in Jesus' name. (Rom 6:13)

A WORD IN VERSE

Set apart wholly, spirit, soul, and frame,I yield to Him who makes the vessel clean;The God of peace is sanctifying flame,Refining all the hidden and unseen.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents09 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202610

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Saturday

WEEK 2
THE PROPHETIC WORD
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“We have also a more sure word of prophecy; whereunto ye do well that ye take heed, as unto a light that shineth in a dark place, until the day dawn, and the day star arise in your hearts:”2 Peter 1:19 (KJV)

REFLECTION

The prophetic word is a light shining in a dark place, a sure guide when the way is unclear. God has not left you to stumble in the dark but has given His word to light your path. When circumstances confuse and voices multiply, the word of God stands sure. Hold fast to what He has spoken today, for His word will not fail and His light will not go out.

I DECREE

1

I have a sure word of prophecy as a light shining in a dark place over my life.

2 Peter 1:19
2

God confirms the word of His servant and performs the counsel of His messengers to me.

Isaiah 44:26
3

Every word God has spoken over me shall not return void but accomplishes His pleasure.

Isaiah 55:11
4

His word is a lamp to my feet and a light to my path when the way is unclear.

Psalm 119:105
5

I hold fast to what God has spoken, for His word stands sure when all else shifts. Glory!

Matthew 24:35

PROPHECY

A sure word is lighting your path! What confused you is coming into the light of His word!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for Your sure word. (2 Pet 1:19)

Confirm and perform Your word over me. (Isa 44:26)

Let every true prophecy come to pass in Jesus' name. (Num 23:19)

A WORD IN VERSE

A sure word shines within the darkest night,A lamp to guide my feet along the way;When shadows fall, His word becomes my light,And leads me surely into perfect day.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents10 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202611

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Sunday

WEEK 2
THE ALTAR OF WORSHIP
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“I beseech you therefore, brethren, by the mercies of God, that ye present your bodies a living sacrifice, holy, acceptable unto God, which is your reasonable service.”Romans 12:1 (KJV)

REFLECTION

Worship is the altar where you lay down your whole self as a living sacrifice. It is not confined to song but is the surrender of your entire life to God as an act of reasonable worship. On this altar your desires, plans, and will are offered up to the One who is worthy. Worship Him today with more than your lips, for the truest worship is a life laid down.

I DECREE

1

I present my body a living sacrifice, holy and acceptable, my reasonable worship.

Romans 12:1
2

I lift my hands in His name and bless Him while I live, holding nothing back.

Psalm 63:4
3

I worship in spirit and in truth, and the Father seeks and welcomes such worship.

John 4:23
4

I bow down and kneel before the Lord my Maker, surrendering my whole self to Him.

Psalm 95:6
5

My worship is a life laid down, and in offering all I am changed into His likeness.

Psalm 34:1

PROPHECY

Your worship is rising as a sweet offering! The altar of your life is becoming holy fire!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for the privilege of worship. (John 4:23)

Receive my life as a living sacrifice. (Rom 12:1)

Let my praise be continual in Jesus' name. (Heb 13:15)

A WORD IN VERSE

I lay my life upon the altar's flame,A living sacrifice, my reasonable praise;No mere song of lips, but in His nameI offer all my heart, my will, my days.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents11 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202612

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Monday

WEEK 2
SPIRITUAL HUNGER
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“Blessed are they which do hunger and thirst after righteousness: for they shall be filled.”Matthew 5:6 (KJV)

REFLECTION

Spiritual hunger is a gift, for God fills the hungry and satisfies the thirsty soul. Those who are content with little of God receive little, but those who hunger are filled. This holy dissatisfaction is not a lack of faith but a longing for more of Him. Let your soul pant after God today, for the hungry heart is the one He delights to fill to overflowing.

I DECREE

1

I hunger and thirst after righteousness, and I am filled to overflowing by God.

Matthew 5:6
2

My soul follows hard after Him, and His right hand upholds and satisfies me.

Psalm 63:8
3

I seek the Lord and His strength, and I seek His face evermore without ceasing.

Psalm 105:4
4

As newborn I desire the sincere milk of the Word that I may grow strong thereby.

1 Peter 2:2
5

He fills the hungry with good things and never turns the seeking heart away empty.

Luke 1:53

PROPHECY

A holy hunger is stirring in you! The God who fills the hungry is about to satisfy your soul!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for the hunger You give me. (Matt 5:6)

Satisfy my thirsty soul. (Ps 42:1)

Help me seek You continually in Jesus' name. (Ps 105:4)

A WORD IN VERSE

As pants the deer for cooling streams of water,So thirsts my longing soul, O God, for Thee;This holy hunger, deeper as it ought to,Will surely find its fullness, filling me.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents12 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202613

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Tuesday

WEEK 2
THE CLEANSING BLOOD
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“But if we walk in the light, as he is in the light, we have fellowship one with another, and the blood of Jesus Christ his Son cleanseth us from all sin.”1 John 1:7 (KJV)

REFLECTION

The blood of Jesus does what no effort of yours ever could: it cleanses completely. It washes not only the record of sin but the conscience burdened by it, freeing you to serve God without shame. You do not clean yourself up to approach Him; the blood makes you clean as you come. Rest in that cleansing today, for the blood of Jesus leaves no stain it cannot remove.

I DECREE

1

The blood of Jesus cleanses me from all sin and leaves no stain it cannot remove.

1 John 1:7
2

The blood purges my conscience from dead works to serve the living God freely.

Hebrews 9:14
3

I have boldness to enter the holiest by the blood of Jesus without shame or fear.

Hebrews 10:19
4

If I confess my sins, He is faithful and just to cleanse me from all unrighteousness.

1 John 1:9
5

Washed in the blood, I am whiter than snow, and my past has no hold on me.

Psalm 51:7

PROPHECY

The blood is cleansing you afresh! Every stain and every shame is being washed clean!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for the cleansing blood. (1 John 1:7)

Purge my conscience to serve You. (Heb 9:14)

Give me boldness by the blood in Jesus' name. (Heb 10:19)

A WORD IN VERSE

The blood of Jesus washes white as snowEach stain that guilt and failure left behind;No shame remains where cleansing rivers flow,A conscience purged, a heart made pure and kind.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents13 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202614

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Wednesday

WEEK 2
THE LATTER RAIN
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“Be glad then, ye children of Zion, and rejoice in the LORD your God: for he hath given you the former rain moderately, and he will cause to come down for you the rain, the former rain, and the latter rain in the first month.”Joel 2:23 (KJV)

REFLECTION

The latter rain is God's promise of a fresh outpouring, an increase greater than the beginning. Just as the crops need both early and latter rain to ripen, so your life needs His continued outpouring to bear its fullest fruit. He is not finished with you; the best of His work is still to come. Position yourself for the latter rain today, for God saves His finest outpouring for the harvest.

I DECREE

1

God gives me the former and the latter rain, and my best outpouring is still ahead.

Joel 2:23
2

I ask rain in the time of the latter rain, and the Lord makes bright clouds for me.

Zechariah 10:1
3

He causes His rain to come down on me, the former and the latter in their season.

Hosea 6:3
4

Showers of blessing fall on my life, and my dry places bloom under the outpouring.

Ezekiel 34:26
5

I am patient for the precious fruit, and the latter rain ripens my fullest harvest. Glory!

James 5:7

PROPHECY

The latter rain is coming! A fresh outpouring greater than the first is on the way!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for the latter rain. (Joel 2:23)

Pour showers of blessing on me. (Ezek 34:26)

Come to me like the rain in Jesus' name. (Hos 6:3)

A WORD IN VERSE

The latter rain will fall upon my field,And ripen all the early rain began;A greater outpouring, a richer yield,The finest fruit within the Father's plan.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents14 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202615

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Thursday

WEEK 3
THE NARROW WAY
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“Because strait is the gate, and narrow is the way, which leadeth unto life, and few there be that find it.”Matthew 7:14 (KJV)

REFLECTION

The narrow way is not the popular road, but it is the one that leads to life. Few find it because it requires surrender, but those who walk it discover a joy the broad road never offers. This is the path of the just, growing brighter with every faithful step. Choose the narrow way today, for though it is less travelled, it alone leads home.

I DECREE

1

I enter the narrow gate that leads unto life, though few will walk that road.

Matthew 7:14
2

The path of the just shines brighter and brighter unto the perfect day.

Proverbs 4:18
3

I choose the harder, holier road, and it leads me home where the broad road never could.

Psalm 16:11
4

I walk in the way of holiness, and no unclean thing prospers along my chosen path.

Isaiah 35:8
5

Narrow though it is, this way carries a joy and a reward the world knows nothing of.

Matthew 7:13

PROPHECY

The narrow path is brightening before you! What few will walk is leading you into life!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for the way of life. (Matt 7:14)

Help me keep my eyes on Jesus. (Heb 12:2)

Let me follow the Lamb faithfully in Jesus' name. (Rev 14:4)

A WORD IN VERSE

I choose the narrow gate, the harder way,Though few will walk the road that leads to life;It shines the brighter to the perfect day,And leads me home beyond the toil and strife.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents15 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202616

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Friday

WEEK 3
THE REFINER'S FIRE
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“But he knoweth the way that I take: when he hath tried me, I shall come forth as gold.”Job 23:10 (KJV)

REFLECTION

The refiner's fire is not meant to destroy you but to purify you. God turns up the heat not in anger but in love, drawing out the impurities so that His image shines clearer in you. The Refiner watches closely, removing the fire the moment He sees His reflection. Trust His hand in the heat today, for you will come forth as gold, more precious than before.

I DECREE

1

When He has tried me, I shall come forth as gold, purer and more precious than before.

Job 23:10
2

He sits as a refiner and purifier, and He draws out the dross until His face is seen.

Malachi 3:3
3

The trial of my faith is more precious than gold that perishes, and it works for me.

1 Peter 1:7
4

I am chosen in the furnace of affliction, and the fire that tries me cannot destroy me.

Isaiah 48:10
5

The heat is not against me but for me, and I trust the hand that holds me in the flame.

1 Corinthians 3:13

PROPHECY

You will come forth as gold! The fire that tries you is purifying, not destroying you!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for refining me. (Mal 3:3)

Let me come forth as gold. (Job 23:10)

Perfect Your work in me through every trial in Jesus' name. (James 1:4)

A WORD IN VERSE

The Refiner's fire is love and not His wrath,He melts to draw the dross and shame away;And when He sees His face along my path,He lifts me, gold, into the perfect day.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents16 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202617

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Saturday

WEEK 3
THE OIL OF THE SPIRIT
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“But my horn shalt thou exalt like the horn of an unicorn: I shall be anointed with fresh oil.”Psalm 92:10 (KJV)

REFLECTION

The oil of the Spirit is the anointing that makes the difference between effort and effectiveness. It is not by human might or power but by the Spirit of God that the work is done. Fresh oil is available for every new season, breaking yokes and lightening burdens. Ask for a fresh anointing today, for the oil of the Spirit turns ordinary vessels into instruments of God's power.

I DECREE

1

I am anointed with fresh oil, and the anointing makes the difference striving cannot.

Psalm 92:10
2

Not by might nor by power, but by My Spirit, says the Lord, the work is done in me.

Zechariah 4:6
3

The wise take oil in their vessels, and I keep my lamp full and my flame burning.

Matthew 25:4
4

The anointing abides in me and teaches me all things, and I need no man to deceive me.

1 John 2:27
5

Every yoke is destroyed and every burden lifted because of the anointing upon me.

Isaiah 10:27

PROPHECY

Fresh oil is being poured upon you! A new anointing is breaking yokes this season!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for the fresh oil on me. (Ps 92:10)

Keep my vessel full of Your Spirit. (Matt 25:4)

Let my lamp never go dim in Jesus' name. (Matt 25:7)

A WORD IN VERSE

Anointed with the Spirit's fresh new oil,Not by my might but by His breath alone;The yoke destroyed, released from fruitless toil,I move in power that flows not from my own.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents17 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202618

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Sunday

WEEK 3
THE VICTORIOUS CHURCH
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“And I say also unto thee, That thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church; and the gates of hell shall not prevail against it.”Matthew 16:18 (KJV)

REFLECTION

The church of Jesus Christ is built on a rock, and no power of hell can prevail against it. You are part of a victorious body, not a defeated remnant hoping to survive. The gates of hell are on the defensive, for the church is advancing, not retreating. Stand today in that victory, for you belong to a kingdom that cannot be shaken and a church that cannot be overcome.

I DECREE

1

I am part of the church Christ builds, and the gates of hell shall not prevail against it.

Matthew 16:18
2

No weapon formed against me and the body of Christ shall prosper in any way.

Isaiah 54:17
3

I am built together for a habitation of God through the Spirit, a living stone in His house.

Ephesians 2:22
4

I am fitly joined together with the saints, and the whole body advances, not retreats.

Ephesians 4:16
5

I belong to a kingdom that cannot be shaken and a church that cannot be overcome. Glory!

1 Peter 2:5

PROPHECY

The gates of hell will not prevail against you! You are part of a victorious, advancing church!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for Your victorious church. (Matt 16:18)

Knit me together with Your people. (Eph 4:16)

Build us into Your dwelling place in Jesus' name. (Eph 2:22)

A WORD IN VERSE

Upon the rock my Saviour builds His own,And hell's dark gates shall never once prevail;I stand within a kingdom overthrownBy none, a victory that cannot fail.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents18 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202619

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Monday

WEEK 3
THE SPIRIT OF WISDOM
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“That the God of our Lord Jesus Christ, the Father of glory, may give unto you the spirit of wisdom and revelation in the knowledge of him:”Ephesians 1:17 (KJV)

REFLECTION

The spirit of wisdom is God's provision for a life that must navigate complexity. He does not leave you to your own limited understanding but offers His wisdom liberally to all who ask. This wisdom is not merely knowledge but revelation, the unveiling of God Himself and His ways. Ask for it today, for the God who gives wisdom without reproach delights to enlighten the eyes of your understanding.

I DECREE

1

God gives me the spirit of wisdom and revelation in the knowledge of Him.

Ephesians 1:17
2

If I lack wisdom, I ask of God who gives liberally, and it is given without reproach.

James 1:5
3

Christ is made unto me wisdom, righteousness, sanctification, and redemption.

1 Corinthians 1:30
4

I am filled with the knowledge of His will in all wisdom and spiritual understanding.

Colossians 1:9
5

The eyes of my understanding are enlightened, and revelation opens to my heart.

Daniel 2:21

PROPHECY

The spirit of wisdom is resting on you! Revelation and understanding are opening to your heart!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for the spirit of wisdom. (Eph 1:17)

Fill me with the knowledge of Your will. (Col 1:9)

Make Christ my wisdom in every matter in Jesus' name. (1 Cor 1:30)

A WORD IN VERSE

The spirit of His wisdom fills my mind,Revealing depths my reason could not reach;The eyes of understanding, once so blind,Now see the truths that only He can teach.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents19 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202620

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Tuesday

WEEK 3
OVERFLOWING GRATITUDE
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“Bless the LORD, O my soul: and all that is within me, bless his holy name.”Psalm 103:1 (KJV)

REFLECTION

Overflowing gratitude is the natural response of a heart awake to God's goodness. When you remember His benefits, thanksgiving rises unbidden and fills every corner of your soul. Gratitude does not deny hardship but chooses to magnify the Giver above the trouble. Bless the Lord today with all that is within you, for the grateful heart lives in a wealth that no circumstance can steal.

I DECREE

1

I bless the Lord with all that is within me, and I forget not all His benefits.

Psalm 103:1
2

When I remember His goodness, thanksgiving rises unbidden and fills my whole soul.

Psalm 103:2
3

Gratitude magnifies the Giver above every trouble, and my mountains bow to my praise.

Psalm 34:3
4

I make a joyful noise unto the Lord and come before His presence with singing.

Psalm 100:1
5

My grateful heart lives in a wealth no circumstance can steal, and it multiplies my joy.

1 Thessalonians 5:18

PROPHECY

Gratitude is overflowing in you! As you bless the Lord, His goodness will multiply before your eyes!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for all Your benefits. (Ps 103:2)

Let me abound in thanksgiving. (Col 2:7)

Help me give thanks in everything in Jesus' name. (Eph 5:20)

A WORD IN VERSE

Bless the Lord, O all within my soul,And do not once forget His benefits;His goodness makes the broken spirit whole,And gratitude in every corner sits.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents20 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202621

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Wednesday

WEEK 3
THE GREATER WORKS
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“Verily, verily, I say unto you, He that believeth on me, the works that I do shall he do also; and greater works than these shall he do; because I go unto my Father.”John 14:12 (KJV)

REFLECTION

Jesus promised that those who believe would do the works He did, and even greater works. This is not presumption but the plain promise of the One who sent His Spirit to empower you. You are not meant to merely admire His works but to continue them in His name. Step out in faith today, for the same power that worked through Christ now works through the believing.

I DECREE

1

The works that Jesus did I do also, and greater works, because He has gone to the Father.

John 14:12
2

These signs follow me because I believe: in His name I cast out devils and heal the sick.

Mark 16:17
3

I am a labourer together with God, and His power works mightily through my yielded hands.

2 Corinthians 6:1
4

I continue the works of Christ in His name, not merely admiring them from a distance.

Acts 1:8
5

The same power that worked through Christ now works through me who believes.

Colossians 1:29

PROPHECY

Greater works are before you! The power that flowed through Christ is flowing through you!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for the works You enable me to do. (John 14:12)

Let signs follow my faith. (Mark 16:17)

Make me fruitful in every good work in Jesus' name. (Col 1:10)

A WORD IN VERSE

The works He did, He promised I would do,And greater still by His empowering hand;No idle watcher, but a vessel true,Through whom His power moves across the land.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents21 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202622

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Thursday

WEEK 4
THE UNSHAKABLE KINGDOM
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“Wherefore we receiving a kingdom which cannot be moved, let us have grace, whereby we may serve God acceptably with reverence and godly fear:”Hebrews 12:28 (KJV)

REFLECTION

You have received a kingdom that cannot be shaken, no matter how the world trembles around you. When everything that can be shaken is shaken, what remains is the unshakable kingdom of God, and you belong to it. This is your security, not in circumstances but in a kingdom that endures forever. Stand firm today, for you are rooted in what cannot be moved.

I DECREE

1

I have received a kingdom that cannot be moved while everything around me trembles.

Hebrews 12:28
2

I am as Mount Zion, which cannot be removed but abides forever unshaken.

Psalm 125:1
3

When all that can be shaken is shaken, the kingdom I belong to remains standing.

Isaiah 9:7
4

His kingdom rules over all, and my security rests not in circumstances but in Him.

Psalm 103:19
5

Heaven and earth shall pass away, but His word and His kingdom in me endure. Glory!

Matthew 24:35

PROPHECY

You stand on what cannot be shaken! When all else trembles, your kingdom will remain!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for an unshakable kingdom. (Heb 12:28)

Establish me on what cannot be moved. (Isa 9:7)

Let Your kingdom reign in me in Jesus' name. (Rom 14:17)

A WORD IN VERSE

I have received a kingdom firm and sure,That shaking earth and hell cannot remove;Like Zion's mount, immovable, secure,I rest within His everlasting love.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents22 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202623

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Friday

WEEK 4
THE GIFT OF GRACE
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“For by grace are ye saved through faith; and that not of yourselves: it is the gift of God:”Ephesians 2:8 (KJV)

REFLECTION

Grace is the gift you could never earn and never deserve, yet freely receive. You were saved by it, not by works, so that no one could boast. This unmerited favour is the ground on which you stand and the air in which you live. Receive the gift of grace afresh today, for the moment you try to earn it, you forfeit the very thing that saves.

I DECREE

1

By grace I am saved through faith, and that not of myself; it is the gift of God.

Ephesians 2:8
2

Where sin abounded, grace did much more abound, and grace reigns over my life.

Romans 5:20
3

By Christ I have access by faith into this grace wherein I stand secure and unashamed.

Romans 5:2
4

The grace of God that brings salvation has appeared and teaches me to live godly.

Titus 2:11
5

Grace and peace are multiplied to me through the knowledge of God and of Jesus my Lord.

2 Peter 1:2

PROPHECY

Grace is meeting you afresh! What you could never earn is being freely given again!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for the gift of grace. (Eph 2:8)

Multiply grace and peace to me. (2 Pet 1:2)

Let me stand firm in grace in Jesus' name. (Rom 5:2)

A WORD IN VERSE

By grace alone, through faith, and not my own,I stand accepted, ransomed, and set free;No works could earn the mercy I have known,The gift of God poured freely out for me.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents23 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202624

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Saturday

WEEK 4
THE SEPARATED LIFE
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“Paul, a servant of Jesus Christ, called to be an apostle, separated unto the gospel of God,”Romans 1:1 (KJV)

REFLECTION

The separated life is one set apart for God's purposes, distinct from the pattern of the world. This is not isolation but consecration, a deliberate choosing of God's way over the crowd's. Those whom God uses greatly are those He has first set apart quietly. Embrace your separation today, for the life set apart for God is the life positioned for His purposes.

I DECREE

1

I am separated unto the gospel of God, set apart from the pattern of this world.

Romans 1:1
2

I come out from among them and am separate, and God receives me as His own.

2 Corinthians 6:17
3

I am a chosen generation, a royal priesthood, a peculiar people for God's own use.

1 Peter 2:9
4

Those God uses greatly He first sets apart quietly, and I embrace my consecration.

2 Timothy 2:21
5

My separation is not isolation but positioning for the purpose of God over my life.

Numbers 23:9

PROPHECY

You are set apart for something greater! The separated life is positioning you for God's purpose!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for setting me apart. (Rom 1:1)

Keep me unstained by the world. (John 17:16)

Make me a vessel of honour in Jesus' name. (2 Tim 2:21)

A WORD IN VERSE

Set apart, called out, and consecrated whole,I follow not the pattern of the crowd;A separated life, a yielded soul,For God's own purpose, humble, not proud.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents24 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202625

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Sunday

WEEK 4
THE POWER OF FORGIVENESS
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“And when ye stand praying, forgive, if ye have ought against any: that your Father also which is in heaven may forgive you your trespasses.”Mark 11:25 (KJV)

REFLECTION

Forgiveness is one of the most powerful forces God has placed in your hands. It releases you from the prison of bitterness and frees your heart to heal. To forgive is not to excuse the wrong but to release the debt to God, as He released yours. Choose forgiveness today, for the one who forgives is freer than the one who holds the offense.

I DECREE

1

When I stand praying, I forgive, that my Father in heaven may also forgive me.

Mark 11:25
2

I forbear and forgive even as Christ forgave me, releasing every debt to God.

Colossians 3:13
3

Forgiveness frees me from the prison of bitterness and heals my heart within.

Ephesians 4:32
4

I look diligently lest any root of bitterness spring up and defile my life.

Hebrews 12:15
5

As I forgive, I am forgiven, and the one who releases is freer than the one who holds.

Luke 6:37

PROPHECY

The power of forgiveness is setting you free! As you release others, your own heart is being healed!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for forgiving me completely. (Eph 4:32)

Help me release every offence. (Mark 11:25)

Root out all bitterness from me in Jesus' name. (Heb 12:15)

A WORD IN VERSE

I loose the debt that others owe to me,As God in Christ has loosed my heavy debt;Forgiveness sets the bound and bitter free,And heals the wounds I struggle to forget.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents25 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202626

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Monday

WEEK 4
THE LIVING HOPE
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, which according to his abundant mercy hath begotten us again unto a lively hope by the resurrection of Jesus Christ from the dead,”1 Peter 1:3 (KJV)

REFLECTION

Living hope is not wishful thinking but confident expectation anchored in the risen Christ. Because He lives, your hope is alive, unshakable, and reserved in heaven for you. This hope does not disappoint, for it rests not on circumstances but on the finished work of Jesus. Let living hope fill you today, for the God of hope delights to make you abound in it.

I DECREE

1

I am begotten again unto a living hope by the resurrection of Jesus from the dead.

1 Peter 1:3
2

Because He lives, my hope is alive, unshakable, and reserved in heaven for me.

1 Peter 1:4
3

The God of hope fills me with all joy and peace, that I abound in hope by His Spirit.

Romans 15:13
4

My hope is an anchor of the soul, both sure and steadfast, entering within the veil.

Hebrews 6:19
5

This hope maketh not ashamed, for the love of God is shed abroad in my heart. Glory!

Romans 5:5

PROPHECY

A living hope is rising in you! What almost died in you is coming back to life through Christ!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for my living hope. (1 Pet 1:3)

Anchor my soul in You. (Heb 6:19)

Let Christ my hope shine through me in Jesus' name. (Col 1:27)

A WORD IN VERSE

A living hope, alive because He lives,Is born anew within my waiting heart;No fading wish, but confidence He gives,A hope that death itself cannot depart.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents26 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202627

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Tuesday

WEEK 4
THE SOWER'S REWARD
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“But this I say, He which soweth sparingly shall reap also sparingly; and he which soweth bountifully shall reap also bountifully.”2 Corinthians 9:6 (KJV)

REFLECTION

The law of the harvest is unfailing: you reap what you sow, and you reap in proportion to your sowing. The one who sows sparingly reaps sparingly, but the generous sower reaps a generous reward. God is no man's debtor, and every seed sown in faith is remembered. Sow bountifully today, for the sower's reward is measured by the sowing.

I DECREE

1

I sow bountifully, and therefore I reap bountifully, for God is no man's debtor.

2 Corinthians 9:6
2

I give, and it is given back to me, pressed down, shaken together, and running over.

Luke 6:38
3

Every seed I sow in faith is remembered, and there is that scatters and yet increases.

Proverbs 11:24
4

I cast my bread upon the waters, and after many days it returns to me multiplied.

Ecclesiastes 11:1
5

God gives seed to the sower and bread for food, and He multiplies my seed sown.

2 Corinthians 9:10

PROPHECY

The sower's reward is coming! What you gave and sowed is returning pressed down and overflowing!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for the seeds I have sown. (2 Cor 9:6)

Multiply my giving back to me. (Prov 11:25)

Make my life a fruitful field in Jesus' name. (Phil 4:18)

A WORD IN VERSE

I sow in faith, and bountiful I reap,For God rewards the open, giving hand;No seed is lost, no harvest do I keepFrom springing up in due time on my land.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents27 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202628

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Wednesday

WEEK 4
THE RESTORED SOUL
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“He restoreth my soul: he leadeth me in the paths of righteousness for his name’s sake.”Psalm 23:3 (KJV)

REFLECTION

The Shepherd restores the soul, tending what is depleted and reviving what is weary. There is no wound too deep for His restoring, no dryness His still waters cannot refresh. He leads you to green pastures not to abandon you but to renew you. Let Him restore your soul today, for the God who is your Shepherd delights to make the weary whole again.

I DECREE

1

The Lord restores my soul and leads me in paths of righteousness for His name's sake.

Psalm 23:3
2

He restores unto me the joy of His salvation and upholds me with His free Spirit.

Psalm 51:12
3

There is no wound too deep for His restoring, no dryness His waters cannot refresh.

Psalm 23:2
4

He heals the broken in heart and binds up all their wounds, and He makes me whole.

Psalm 147:3
5

The God who is my Shepherd delights to make the weary whole again, and He revives me.

Isaiah 57:18

PROPHECY

Your soul is being restored! What was depleted and weary is being revived by the Shepherd!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for restoring my soul. (Ps 23:3)

Heal every broken place in me. (Ps 147:3)

Give me beauty for ashes in Jesus' name. (Isa 61:3)

A WORD IN VERSE

He leads me to the quiet, restful stream,And there restores my weary, thirsting soul;The Shepherd tends the broken, mends the seam,And makes the tired and wounded spirit whole.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents28 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202629

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Thursday

WEEK 5
THE FAITHFUL WITNESS
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“But ye shall receive power, after that the Holy Ghost is come upon you: and ye shall be witnesses unto me both in Jerusalem, and in all Judaea, and in Samaria, and unto the uttermost part of the earth.”Acts 1:8 (KJV)

REFLECTION

You are called to be a faithful witness, telling of what God has done in your life. This is not the task of the eloquent few but of every believer empowered by the Spirit. A witness simply tells what they have seen and heard, and your story is a testimony no one can argue with. Be His witness today, for the Spirit who empowers you turns your life into living evidence of His goodness.

I DECREE

1

I receive power after the Holy Ghost comes upon me, and I am His witness in the earth.

Acts 1:8
2

I am His witness, chosen that I may know Him, believe Him, and declare Him to others.

Isaiah 43:10
3

I am a living epistle, known and read of all men, testifying by the life I live.

2 Corinthians 3:2
4

My story is a testimony no one can argue with, and it strengthens the faith of many.

Revelation 12:11
5

How beautiful are the feet that bring good news, and I carry His good news everywhere.

Romans 10:15

PROPHECY

You are becoming a faithful witness! Your story is about to strengthen the faith of many!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for making me Your witness. (Acts 1:8)

Let my life be a living letter for You. (2 Cor 3:3)

Help my light glorify You in Jesus' name. (Matt 5:16)

A WORD IN VERSE

I am His witness, telling what I know,Of grace that found me, mercy that forgave;The power of the Spirit makes me goAnd tell the world how mighty He to save.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents29 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202630

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Friday

WEEK 5
THE OVERFLOWING CUP
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“Thou preparest a table before me in the presence of mine enemies: thou anointest my head with oil; my cup runneth over.”Psalm 23:5 (KJV)

REFLECTION

God does not fill your cup to the brim but until it overflows. His intention for you is not bare sufficiency but abundance that spills over to bless others. The overflowing cup is the picture of a life so full of God that it cannot help but pour out. Step into that overflow today, for you were blessed to be a blessing, filled in order to pour.

I DECREE

1

My cup runs over, for God fills me not to the brim but until I overflow to others.

Psalm 23:5
2

Out of my belly flow rivers of living water that refresh the thirsty around me.

John 7:38
3

I am filled with all the fullness of God, and His fullness spills through my life.

Ephesians 3:19
4

I was blessed to be a blessing, filled in order to pour into the lives of many.

Genesis 12:2
5

God gives me life more abundantly, and my overflow becomes another's supply. Glory!

John 10:10

PROPHECY

Your cup is overflowing! What God is pouring into you will spill over to bless many!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for my overflowing cup. (Ps 23:5)

Fill me with all Your fullness. (Eph 3:19)

Let rivers of life flow through me in Jesus' name. (John 7:38)

A WORD IN VERSE

My cup is filled and runs beyond its brim,For God is lavish, pouring without end;And from the overflow I pour for HimUpon the thirsty, stranger, and the friend.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
←Contents30 / 31→
← Days Next →
OCT 202631

Daily Victory Confession

Job 22:28 · Saturday

MONTH ENDS
THE FINISHED WORK
ANCHOR VERSE OF THE DAY

“When Jesus therefore had received the vinegar, he said, It is finished: and he bowed his head, and gave up the ghost.”John 19:30 (KJV)

REFLECTION

The finished work of Christ is the foundation on which all else rests. When Jesus cried it is finished, He declared the debt of sin paid in full and the way to God opened forever. You add nothing to this work; you rest in it and build upon it. Close this month standing on the finished work, for what Christ completed on the cross can never be undone.

I DECREE

1

It is finished; my salvation is complete in Christ, and I add nothing to His work.

John 19:30
2

By one offering He has perfected me forever, and I rest in what He has completed.

Hebrews 10:14
3

I am complete in Him who is the head of all principality and power.

Colossians 2:10
4

What Christ finished on the cross can never be undone, and I build my life upon it.

Colossians 2:14
5

There remains a rest for me, and I have entered into His rest, ceasing from striving.

Hebrews 4:9

PROPHECY

The finished work stands sure! What Christ completed for you can never be undone!

PRAYER

Thank You Father for the finished work of Christ. (John 19:30)

Help me rest in my completeness in Him. (Col 2:10)

Let me live from victory, not for it, in Jesus' name. (Heb 10:14)

A WORD IN VERSE

It is finished, cried my dying Lord,And nothing more can I or need I do;I rest upon the finished, sure reward,The perfect work that made me wholly new.
www.eemodiae.org@thehjcw
Emmanuel I. EmodiaeLead Pastor
